title: Treasure of the Millionaire
description: The treasures once sought and amassed by millionaire tycoons now lie scattered and dormant across the world. Hunt them down and see if you can claim them.
body:
The treasures once sought and amassed by 20 legendary millionaire tycoons now lie scattered and dormant across the world. Hunt them down and see if you can claim them.

NOTICE: This mod is still in development. Currently, it does not drop in SURVIVAL Mode.

### Weapon List

#### Uncommon
1. Piglin Brute Axe
    - The axe used by the Piglin Brute.
2. Wither Skeleton Sword
    - The powerful great sword that sometimes turns enemies into wither skeletons.

#### Rare
1. Anubiss Scythe
    - The scythe of the god of the underworld, which cuts the souls of the dead.
2. Dolphin Knife
    - The short sword forged by the sea spirit.
3. Murasame
    - The legendary katana that steals the life force of the opponent.
4. Light Saber
    - The dark saber that cuts through the darkness written on it occasionally.
5. Ice Sword
    - The sword made of ice that freezes everything.
6. Orichalcum
    - The short sword made of the mysterious metal that makes the body light.

#### Epic
1. Triton Hammer
    - The hammer of the god of the sea, which controls the storm.
2. Ragnarok
    - The sword that embodies the end of the gods.
